steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: The passage states writers “have drawn on these stories to craft a rich portrait.” The word must convey that traditional stories are the source for modern Hawaiian literature.

steps.title: Match the word to the meaning
steps.content: ”Derived from” directly conveys the source relationship described. The other three choices suggest replacement, rumination, or prediction instead. That matches choice D — D is correct.
